---
title: "Burden of diffuse myocardial fibrosis assessed by cardiac magnetic resonance in repaired tetralogy of Fallot: A systematic review and meta-analysis"
date: 2025-12-01
author:
  - name: Secco, José Carlos P.
  - name: Schaustz, Eduardo
  - name: Innocenzi, Adriana M.
  - name: Fernandes, Fernanda.P.
  - name: Medei, Emiliano
  - name: Silvestre-Sousa, Andréa
  - name: Camargo, Gabriel C.
  - name: Luiz, Ronir R.
  - name: Moreira, Jessica P.L.
  - name: Magliano, Carlos A.S.
  - name: Moll-Bernardes, Renata
  - name: Póvoa-Corrêa, Mariana
abstract: > 
  Resumo não disponível.
categories: [article]
citation: 
  container-title: "International Journal of Cardiology Congenital Heart Disease"
  volume: 22
  doi: "10.1016/j.ijcchd.2025.100631"
---

```{=html}
<nav aria-label="breadcrumb">
  <ol class="breadcrumb">
    <li class="breadcrumb-item"><a href="../../index.html">Home</a></li>
    <li class="breadcrumb-item"><a href="../index.html">Publicações</a></li>
    <li class="breadcrumb-item active" aria-current="page">Burden of diffuse myocardial fibrosis assessed by cardiac magnetic resonance in repaired tetralogy of Fallot: A systematic review and meta-analysis</li>
  </ol>
</nav>
